// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
                services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.OrderService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
                {
                    var p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>>();
                    var s0_m0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
                    var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.OrderService(p0);
                    s0.SetOrderRepository(s0_m0);
                    return s0;
                });
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>>();
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.User>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.User>>());
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
                services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>());
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
